title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
